mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_enrollment ( application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, teaching_mode, course_name, class_time, frequency_per_week, lesson_price, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, weekly_schedule_deadline_at, weekly_schedule_submitted_at, weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{applicationId}, #{roomId}, #{proposalId}, #{teacherUid}, #{studentUid}, #{teachingMode}, #{courseName}, #{classTime}, #{frequencyPerWeek}, #{lessonPrice}, #{status}, #{trialStartAt}, #{trialEndAt}, #{weeklyScheduleDeadlineAt}, #{weeklyScheduleSubmittedAt}, #{weeklyReminder12hSentAt}, #{weeklyReminder6hSentAt}, #{weeklyReminder1hSentAt}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, teaching_mode, course_name, class_time, frequency_per_week, lesson_price, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, weekly_schedule_deadline_at, weekly_schedule_submitted_at, weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, teaching_mode, course_name, class_time, frequency_per_week, lesson_price, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, weekly_schedule_deadline_at, weekly_schedule_submitted_at, weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, teaching_mode, course_name, class_time, frequency_per_week, lesson_price, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, weekly_schedule_deadline_at, weekly_schedule_submitted_at, weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, teaching_mode, course_name, class_time, frequency_per_week, lesson_price, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, weekly_schedule_deadline_at, weekly_schedule_submitted_at, weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE status = 'TRIALING' AND trial_end_at IS NOT NULL AND trial_end_at <= #{now} ORDER BY trial_end_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, teaching_mode, course_name, class_time, frequency_per_week, lesson_price, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, weekly_schedule_deadline_at, weekly_schedule_submitted_at, weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE status = 'TRIAL_WAIT_WEEKLY_SCHEDULE' AND weekly_schedule_submitted_at IS NULL AND weekly_schedule_deadline_at IS NOT NULL AND weekly_schedule_deadline_at <= #{now} ORDER BY weekly_schedule_deadline_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, teaching_mode, course_name, class_time, frequency_per_week, lesson_price, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, weekly_schedule_deadline_at, weekly_schedule_submitted_at, weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE status = 'TRIAL_WAIT_WEEKLY_SCHEDULE' AND weekly_schedule_submitted_at IS NULL AND weekly_schedule_deadline_at IS NOT NULL AND ( (weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at IS NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, #{now}, weekly_schedule_deadline_at) BETWEEN 11 AND 12) OR (weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at IS NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, #{now}, weekly_schedule_deadline_at) BETWEEN 5 AND 6) OR (weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at IS NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, #{now}, weekly_schedule_deadline_at) BETWEEN 1 AND 60) ) ORDER BY weekly_schedule_deadline_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM course_enrollment WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status IN ('APPLYING', 'WAIT_PAY', 'COMMUNICATING', 'TRIALING', 'TRIAL_WAIT_STUDENT_DECISION', 'TRIAL_WAIT_WEEKLY_SCHEDULE', 'TRIAL_REFUND_REVIEW', 'TEACHING', 'FINISHED') ) + ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tutor_appointment WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status IN (2, 3) ) + ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM live_class_session WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status IN ('CREATED', 'JOIN_OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS') )

SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, teaching_mode, course_name, class_time, frequency_per_week, lesson_price, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, weekly_schedule_deadline_at, weekly_schedule_submitted_at, weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE teacher_uid = #{teacherUid} ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, teaching_mode, course_name, class_time, frequency_per_week, lesson_price, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, weekly_schedule_deadline_at, weekly_schedule_submitted_at, weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at, weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE student_uid = #{studentUid} ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update:
UPDATE course_enrollment SET status = #{nextStatus},
proposal_id = #{proposalId},
trial_start_at = #{trialStartAt},
trial_end_at = #{trialEndAt},
update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus}
UPDATE course_enrollment SET status = #{nextStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE course_enrollment SET status = 'TEACHING',
class_time = #{classTime},
frequency_per_week = #{frequencyPerWeek},
lesson_price = #{lessonPrice},
weekly_schedule_submitted_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus}

UPDATE course_enrollment SET status = 'TRIAL_WAIT_WEEKLY_SCHEDULE', weekly_schedule_deadline_at = #{deadlineAt}, weekly_schedule_submitted_at = NULL, weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at = NULL, weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at = NULL, weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus}

UPDATE course_enrollment SET
weekly_reminder_12h_sent_at = #{sentAt},
weekly_reminder_6h_sent_at = #{sentAt},
weekly_reminder_1h_sent_at = #{sentAt},
update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE course_enrollment SET status = 'TRIALING', proposal_id = #{proposalId}, teaching_mode = #{teachingMode}, course_name = #{courseName}, class_time = #{classTime}, frequency_per_week = #{frequencyPerWeek}, lesson_price = #{lessonPrice}, trial_start_at = #{trialStartAt}, trial_end_at = #{trialEndAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus}
UPDATE course_enrollment SET room_id = #{roomId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND (room_id IS NULL OR room_id = 0)
